# Greenwood Philippines

> Greenwood Philippines is a manufacturer and direct supplier of warehouse-priced home finishing materials — WPC panels, SPC flooring, PVC ceilings, UV boards, PU stone, fences, and more — for Filipino homes and contractors. With 13 branches nationwide, it offers premium interior and exterior finishing materials at wholesale prices with no middleman.

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://greenwoodphilippines.com/): Company overview, product categories, branch locations, and project gallery
- [Product Catalog](https://greenwoodphilippines.com/catalog): Full product range across all categories
- [Wall Solutions](https://greenwoodphilippines.com/catalog/wall): WPC fluted panels, PU stone, UV boards, acoustic panels
- [Floor Solutions](https://greenwoodphilippines.com/catalog/floor): SPC flooring, WPC decking, DIY deck tiles
- [Ceiling Solutions](https://greenwoodphilippines.com/catalog/ceiling): PVC ceiling panels
- [Fence Solutions](https://greenwoodphilippines.com/catalog/fence): WPC privacy, half-privacy, and solar fences
- [Adhesive Solutions](https://greenwoodphilippines.com/catalog/adhesive): Bonding and installation adhesives
- [Finished Projects](https://greenwoodphilippines.com/projects): Real installation photos by location
- [Room Simulator](https://greenwoodphilippines.com/room-simulator): Visualize products on walls, floors, and ceilings
- [FAQs](https://greenwoodphilippines.com/faq): Common questions about products, pricing, and installation

## Products
- WPC: Indoor & Outdoor Fluted Panels, Siding, Decking, Column Cladding, 3-in-1 Fluted, Half-Round
- PVC: Ceiling panels (TU & VG), Half-Round wall panels
- SPC: Flooring (standard and fishbone pattern)
- Wall finishes: UV Board / Marble, PU Stone (Rock, Mushroom, Panel), Bamboo Charcoal, Soft Stone, Acoustic & Honeycomb Panels, Solid Planks
- Fences: Half-Privacy, Full Privacy, Solar
- Adhesives

## Branches (13 nationwide)
Pulilan (Bulacan), Angeles (Pampanga), Lipa City (Batangas), Cabanatuan City (Nueva Ecija), Biñan (Laguna), Bacoor (Cavite), San Carlos City (Pangasinan), San Fernando (La Union), Antipolo (Rizal), Tarlac City (Tarlac), Iloilo, Bataan, Tuguegarao (Cagayan).

## Contact
- Website: https://greenwoodphilippines.com
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/greenwoodphilippines
